elements.original_description: A simple circular icon with a smiling face, radiating positivity and encouragement. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple circular icon with a smiling face, radiating positivity and encouragement, on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A crisp, green $20 bill floating slightly above the white background, with a subtle shine to emphasize its value. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a crisp, green $20 bill floating slightly above a pure white background, with a subtle shine to emphasize its value, cinematic lighting, high resolution, sharp focus, soft bokeh effect, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
